Self.Wiki: Defines parameters related to map area, such as mimicry objects and lock-on values.

intrudeEnable.Wiki: If enabled, invasions are allowed in this area.

lockOnId.Wiki: The lock-on parameters to use by default in this area.

lockOnIdDark.Wiki: The lock-on parameters to when within darkness in this area.

lockOnIdTorch.Wiki: The lock-on parameters to use when a torch is wielded in this area.

isPriorityLockOnIdTorch.Wiki: If enabled, the torch lock-on parameters are prioritized over the others.

isAbyss.Wiki: If enabled, this area is considered the Abyss.

waterMaterial.Wiki: The hit material to use on water contact within this area.

cameraId.Wiki: The camera parameters to use by default for this area.

playerLightSfxId.Wiki: The player light SFX to use for this area.

fallWaterSfxId.AltName: Water SFX ID for Fall Landing

chameleonEnableRare.Wiki: If enabled, chameleon objects may occur in this area.

chameleonWeight1.Wiki: The chance weight for the chameleon object to use slot 1.

chameleonWeight2.Wiki: The chance weight for the chameleon object to use slot 2.

chameleonWeight3.Wiki: The chance weight for the chameleon object to use slot 3.

chameleonWeight4.Wiki: The chance weight for the chameleon object to use slot 4.

chameleonWeight5.Wiki: The chance weight for the chameleon object to use slot 5.

chameleonAngle1.Wiki: The angle correction for this chameleon object.

chameleonAngle2.Wiki: The angle correction for this chameleon object.

chameleonAngle3.Wiki: The angle correction for this chameleon object.

chameleonAngle4.Wiki: The angle correction for this chameleon object.

chameleonAngle5.Wiki: The angle correction for this chameleon object.

chameleonHeight1.Wiki: The height correction for this chameleon object.

chameleonHeight2.Wiki: The height correction for this chameleon object.

chameleonHeight3.Wiki: The height correction for this chameleon object.

chameleonHeight4.Wiki: The height correction for this chameleon object.

chameleonHeight5.Wiki: The height correction for this chameleon object.
